short_description.value: DynamicVis is a dynamic visual perception foundation model for remote sensing imagery, integrating a dynamic region perception backbone based on selective state space models and a meta-embedding multi-instance learning paradigm. It is designed for efficient, scalable, and generalizable high-resolution remote sensing image understanding across diverse tasks.

backbone.value: Dynamic region-aware SSM backbone (Mamba-based selective state space model)

pretext_training_type.value: Supervised multi-instance learning with meta-embedding representations

masking_strategy.value: Dynamic token selection via importance scores and Gumbel noise

pretraining.value: Supervised pretraining on fMoW dataset using meta-embedding-based multi-instance contrastive learning, leveraging region-level annotations and categorical meta-embeddings initialized from CLIP text encoder.

value.value: Selective attention inspired by biological vision
Reduced downsampling kernel size (4 instead of 16)

dataset.value: fMoW-rgb (Functional Map of the World, RGB subset)

sampling.value: Full dataset, consolidated from train/val/test/sequence splits
